_comment: Copy this file to specs/{component-name}.json and fill in your component's values. Remove all _comment fields before finalizing.
description: Brief description of what this component does and its role in the design system.
_comment_figmaNode: Figma node ID of the component set root. From URL node-id param, replace - with :. File key: z6xEkVn88mi5Ai3IHgMrBZ

props._comment: Define all component props. Match Figma property names exactly (camelCase). State props (disabled, loading) are boolean, not variants.

variant._comment: Replace with actual variant values from Figma.

loading.description: Shows spinner, hides content, disables interaction.

iconLeading._comment: Leading icon slot. Component handles sizing internally via size variant.

asChild.description: Radix Slot — renders child element with component styles.

variants._comment: Styling per variant value. Use sys tokens only (not ref tokens, not hex values). See CLAUDE.md Token Mapping Reference.

size._comment: Height, padding, typography, gap, icon size, border-radius per size. Values must match Figma exactly.

variant._comment: Visual style per variant. background, text, border using sys tokens.

states._comment: Interactive states. Use sys tokens. State overlays: sys-state-on-dim-* (dark bg) or sys-state-on-bright-* (light bg).

focused.all: border-2 border-sys-primary-300 on state overlay (focus-visible only)

disabled._comment: Color changes per variant when disabled.

loading.description: Content becomes invisible, spinner centered. Component size preserved. Interaction disabled (pointer-events-none + aria-disabled).

implementation.stateOverlay: Absolute <span> inside component with group-hover/group-active classes. Root needs 'group relative'.
implementation.loadingStrategy: Content marked invisible, Spinner absolute centered.
